Project.0001.description: 项目文件需要转换为 SDK 样式。新式 .NET Framework 项目需要更改项目文件格式，并使用与项目风格和功能对应的 SDK。
Project.0001.label: 项目文件需要转换为 SDK 样式。

links.title: 从 .NET Framework 移植到 .NET 的概述

Project.0002.description:
需要将项目的目标框架更改为已为此升级选择的新目标框架。

在升级期间，目标框架将在适用时调整为对应的平台。在某些情况下，如果项目使用的功能目前在新式 .NET Framework (windows、iOS、Android 等)中具有自己的平台，则在升级后项目会生成多个目标框架。
Project.0002.label: 需要更改项目的目标框架

links.title: 从 .NET Framework 移植到 .NET 的概述

Api.0002.description: API 对所选 .NET 版本存在源代码不兼容：在面向新版本时需要修改代码才能成功编译，例如移除过时的 API 或更改方法签名。
Api.0002.label: 对所选 .NET 版本源代码不兼容

Api.0001.description: API 对所选 .NET 版本存在二进制不兼容：影响现有二进制文件，通常需要重新编译，因为 API 的更改导致旧二进制文件无法加载或执行。
Api.0001.label: 对所选 .NET 版本二进制不兼容

ComInterop.description: COM-specific APIs that have changes or removals in .NET Core/.NET due to cross-platform considerations. Some COM interop functionality requires Windows-specific features. Review COM interop requirements; some APIs require Windows Compatibility Pack.
ComInterop.label: COM Interop Changes

WinFormsLegacyControls.description: Legacy Windows Forms controls that have been removed from .NET Core/5+ including StatusBar, DataGrid, ContextMenu, MainMenu, MenuItem, and ToolBar. These controls were replaced by more modern alternatives. Use ToolStrip, MenuStrip, ContextMenuStrip, and DataGridView instead.
WinFormsLegacyControls.label: Windows Forms Legacy Controls

GdiDrawing.description: System.Drawing APIs for 2D graphics, imaging, and printing that are available via NuGet package System.Drawing.Common. Note: Not recommended for server scenarios due to Windows dependencies; consider cross-platform alternatives like SkiaSharp or ImageSharp for new code.
GdiDrawing.label: GDI+ / System.Drawing

WinForms.description: Windows Forms APIs for building Windows desktop applications with traditional Forms-based UI that are available in .NET on Windows. Enable Windows Desktop support: Option 1 (Recommended): Target net9.0-windows; Option 2: Add <UseWindowsDesktop>true</UseWindowsDesktop>; Option 3 (Legacy): Use Microsoft.NET.Sdk.WindowsDesktop SDK.
WinForms.label: Windows Forms
